markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Woke / DEI
markets.rules_primary: If any Anthropic or U.S. Department of War representative says Woke / DEI as part of hearing on Anthropic PBC v. U.S. Department of War, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the hearing on Anthropic PBC v. U.S. Department of War will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the hearing on Anthropic PBC v. U.S. Department of War will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. 
The event must be opened to the press for a live televised or streamed event to qualify.
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  
The event will resolve based on any Anthropic or U.S. Department of War representative speaking in an official capacity. If any Anthropic or U.S. Department of War representative is or is not present during a livestream, and does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic).

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.

For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event.

Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  
The event will resolve based on any Anthropic or U.S. Department of War representative speaking in an official capacity. If any Anthropic or U.S. Department of War representative is or is not present during a livestream, and does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic).

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Triple Double
markets.rules_primary: If the play by play or color commentator(s) says Triple Double as part of Houston vs Minnesota Professional Basketball Game, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Houston vs Minnesota Professional Basketball Game will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Houston vs Minnesota Professional Basketball Game will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Commentary will count once tip off has occurred and end once the game has concluded. Should the game go into overtime, the commentary will continue to count until the game has ended. If the final play is in review, commentary will end following the referee decision. For the purpose of this market, this market will resolve based on the national broadcast. If it is not nationally televised the home team local broadcast will be used.
Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.
